_meta.description: Map a managed Jira Test issue to its selected test class, stable Xray Test Execution, and optional pinned GUNS ref so GitHub Actions can resolve everything from one place.

GUNSQA-32.note: Reuse the existing execution linked to the G32 runner workflow.
